info.name: OpenCatalogi - DIWOO TOOI/DiWoo Vocabulary Binding
info.description:
API-only contract tests for the DIWOO value-list binding (diwoo-tooi-vocabulary-binding change, WOO-TOOI-001..004). Asserts that the DIWOO sitemap binds informatiecategorie / publisher / soortHandeling to official TOOI/DiWoo URIs, omits (never leaks) an unresolved axis, and that the admin 'Validate DIWOO output' action reports unresolved axes while the sitemap still serves. Per the Playwright-UI-only / Newman-API convention this backend surface is asserted here.

Variables:
- baseUrl: instance base URL (default http://localhost:8080)
- catalogSlug: a WOO catalog slug with DIWOO publications (set per environment)
- categoryCode: a DIWOO category code, e.g. sitemapindex-diwoo-infocat014.xml
- adminAuth: Basic auth header value for an admin (for the validate action)

item.name: WOO-TOOI-001/002/003 DIWOO sitemap binds official TOOI URIs (or omits)

exec: pm.test('200 or 404', () => [200, 404].includes(pm.response.code));
if (pm.response.code === 200) {
const xml = pm.response.text();
// WOO-TOOI-001: any emitted informatiecategorie @resource MUST be an official TOOI kern URI.
const infocat = xml.match(/informatiecategorie[^>]*resource="([^"]+)"/g) || [];
pm.test('informatiecategorie @resource is an official TOOI kern URI', () => infocat.every(m => m.includes('identifier.overheid.nl/tooi/def/thes/kern/c_')));
// WOO-TOOI-002: any emitted publisher @resource MUST be a TOOI organisatie id URI (never an OR UUID).
const pub = xml.match(/publisher[^>]*resource="([^"]+)"/g) || [];
pm.test('publisher @resource (when present) is a TOOI organisatie URI', () => pub.every(m => m.includes('identifier.overheid.nl/tooi/id/')));
// WOO-TOOI-003: soortHandeling @resource MUST be an official TOOI kern URI.
const sh = xml.match(/soortHandeling[^>]*resource="([^"]+)"/g) || [];
pm.test('soortHandeling @resource is an official TOOI kern URI', () => sh.every(m => m.includes('identifier.overheid.nl/tooi/def/thes/kern/c_')));
// Fail-safe: no legacy PLACEHOLDER literals leak into the feed.
pm.test('no PLACEHOLDER literal leaks', () => !xml.includes('PLACEHOLDER'));

item.name: WOO-TOOI-004 Validate DIWOO output reports unresolved axes (admin)

exec: pm.test('200 (admin) or 401/403 (unauthorized)', () => [200, 401, 403].includes(pm.response.code));
if (pm.response.code === 200) {
const doc = pm.response.json();
pm.test('report has valid flag + violations array', () => typeof doc.valid === 'boolean' && Array.isArray(doc.violations));
pm.test('each violation names a document + axis', () => doc.violations.every(v => typeof v.documentLoc === 'string' && ['publisher','informatiecategorie','soortHandeling'].includes(v.axis)));

item.name: WOO-TOOI-004 Validator is advisory — sitemap still serves

exec: pm.test('sitemap is served regardless of validator findings', () => [200, 404].includes(pm.response.code));
